seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: Include the phrase "We value your contributions to the team" in the response.
new_constraint: The word "contribution" must appear only in its singular form.

Subject: Your Vacation Request Approved

Dear [Employee Name],

I am pleased to confirm that your request for vacation days has been approved for the selected dates. Thank you for planning ahead, and I know you will be back refreshed and ready to contribute great results when you return.

Please ensure that handover notes are prepared before you leave. We value your contributions to the team, and your dedication does not go unnoticed. Take care of yourself during your time off!

Best regards,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>

final_answer:
Subject: Your Vacation Request Approved

Dear [Employee Name],

I am pleased to confirm that your request for vacation days has been approved for the selected dates. Thank you for planning ahead, and I know you will be back refreshed and ready to contribute great results when you return.

Please ensure that handover notes are prepared before you leave. We value your contributions to the team, and your dedication does not go unnoticed. Take care of yourself during your time off!

Best regards,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>
